TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: malumaingay a dawa i kasumamadan u kakitaan a tademaw nu Cong-kow u kakaydihay a sasang'a tu zikuc , sisa kauzipan a tademaw, nu Cong-kow caay kalasawad, mutesek ku kalilid tu palahad kacakat nu laylay nu Cong-kow, uzuma satu Si-han ci Cang-say a tademawan tayza i Si-yi mala, muculil tuyni "Si-lu" a zazanan a singanganay. makayza i Cong-kuw satipan nuwamisan milakui' tu talakaway Pa-mi-al a buyu' ciniza, katukuh ayzaay a Pakistan atu Iran, u sabaatay katukuh i O-cuo, mibuhat tu saculilan a laed nu Cung-si , lumaingay a dawa nu Cong-kow patayzaen i nutawan a kanatal, malecad aca u Cung, Si a lalangawan u saayaway a malalacal, mahiza u i labuay mahiza u baatay. == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: mar~…ĺumaiŇčaj a dawa i kasumamadan u kakitaan a tad…ômaw nu ¶oŇč-kow u kakajdińßaj a sasaŇč Ē~ °a tu ziku ¶ , sisa kauzipan a tad…ômaw, nu ¶oŇč-kow ¶aaj kar~…ĺasawad, mut…ôs…ôk ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu par~…ĺańßad ka ¶akat nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ¶oŇč-kow, uzuma satu si-ńßan ¶i ¶aŇč-saj a tad…ômawan tajza i si-ji mar~…ĺa, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tujni "si-r~…ĺu" a zazanan a siŇčaŇčanaj. makajza i ¶oŇč-kuw satipan nuwamisan mir~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu tar~…ĺakawaj pa-mi-ar~…ĺ a buju Ē~ ° ¶iniza, katukuńß ajzaaj a pakistan atu iran, u sabaataj katukuńß i o- ¶uo, mibuńßat tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a r~…ĺa…ôd nu ¶uŇč-si , r~…ĺumaiŇčaj a dawa nu ¶oŇč-kow patajza…ôn i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a ¶a u ¶uŇč, si a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u saajawaj a mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ, mańßiza u i r~…ĺabuaj mańßiza u baataj. == namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ==
S.FORM: malumaingay a dawa i kasumamadan u kakitaan a tademaw nu Cong-kow u kakaydihay a sasang'a tu zikuc , sisa kauzipan a tademaw, nu Cong-kow caay kalasawad, mutesek ku kalilid tu palahad kacakat nu laylay nu Cong-kow, uzuma satu Si-han ci Cang-say a tademawan tayza i Si-yi mala, muculil tuyni "Si-lu" a zazanan a singanganay. makayza i Cong-kuw satipan nuwamisan milakui' tu talakaway Pa-mi-al a buyu' ciniza, katukuh ayzaay a Pakistan atu Iran, u sabaatay katukuh i O-cuo, mibuhat tu saculilan a laed nu Cung-si , lumaingay a dawa nu Cong-kow patayzaen i nutawan a kanatal, malecad aca u Cung, Si a lalangawan u saayaway a malalacal, mahiza u i labuay mahiza u baatay. == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: mar~…ĺumaiŇčaj a dawa i kasumamadan u kakitaan a tad…ômaw nu ¶oŇč-kow u kakajdińßaj a sasaŇč Ē~ °a tu ziku ¶ , sisa kauzipan a tad…ômaw, nu ¶oŇč-kow ¶aaj kar~…ĺasawad, mut…ôs…ôk ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu par~…ĺańßad ka ¶akat nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ¶oŇč-kow, uzuma satu si-ńßan ¶i ¶aŇč-saj a tad…ômawan tajza i si-ji mar~…ĺa, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tujni "si-r~…ĺu" a zazanan a siŇčaŇčanaj. makajza i ¶oŇč-kuw satipan nuwamisan mir~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu tar~…ĺakawaj pa-mi-ar~…ĺ a buju Ē~ ° ¶iniza, katukuńß ajzaaj a pakistan atu iran, u sabaataj katukuńß i o- ¶uo, mibuńßat tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a r~…ĺa…ôd nu ¶uŇč-si , r~…ĺumaiŇčaj a dawa nu ¶oŇč-kow patajza…ôn i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a ¶a u ¶uŇč, si a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u saajawaj a mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ, mańßiza u i r~…ĺabuaj mańßiza u baataj. == namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ==
